agents.stance: Prioritizes open civic access with targeted safeguards.
Prioritizes institutional stability and risk controls.

screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

topic: mandatory content moderation on social media platforms

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Konten yang diterbitkan secara ilegal atau menyesatkan mungkin sulit untuk diidentifikasi dan dievaluasi oleh moderator manusia, sehingga mungkin tidak dapat dicegah sepenuhnya.

Counterargument saya: Meskipun demikian, implementasi otomatisasi dan algoritma dapat membantu mengidentifikasi konten berbahaya lebih cepat dan lebih efisien. Selain itu, pembentukan aturan jelas dan kerjasama antar pihak dapat meningkatkan efektivitas moderasi.

Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Strongest opponent point: Legally or misleading content may be difficult for human moderators to identify and evaluate, thus it might not be possible to prevent it entirely.
Counterargument: Automated systems and algorithms can help identify harmful content faster and more efficiently. Additionally, clear rule-making and collaboration among parties can enhance moderation effectiveness.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Implementasi moderasi otomatis bisa menghasilkan kesalahan positif dan negatif, yang bisa menghapus konten yang sebenarnya tidak berbahaya.
Counterargument saya: Meski ada risiko kesalahan, sistem moderasi otomatis masih lebih efisien dan dapat diperbaiki dengan data yang lebih baik. Selain itu, integrasi sumber daya manusia untuk peninjauan ulang dapat meminimalisir kesalahan.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Strongest opponent point: Implementation of automatic moderation can result in both false positives and false negatives, potentially removing content that is actually harmless.
Counterargument: While there is a risk of errors, automated moderation systems are still more efficient and can be improved with better data. Additionally, integrating human resources for re-review can minimize such errors.
View change: My view has not changed.
